parts.notes:
Machined from SJ2 to fit inside PC4

Transferred from Issues on 2026-03-27: Swing arm alignment problems were traced to size and finish variation in SJ2/SJ3 swivels and fit inside PC4, causing inconsistent insertion height and arm angle. Current direction is to avoid substitutions, isolate incorrect swivel stock, and finalize which SJ3 units can be used, repurposed, or permanently removed from production.
